testcase.name: createExpense_returns400WhenRequiredFieldsMissing

testcase.name: createExpense_returns400ForMalformedJson
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-28 14:40:24.535 DEBUG [main] o.s.w.s.m.m.a.RequestMappingHandlerMapping - Mapped to com.lifetracker.modules.expenses.api.ExpenseController#createExpense(CreateExpenseRequest) 2026-06-28 14:40:24.542 DEBUG [main] o.s.web.method.HandlerMethod - Could not resolve parameter [0] in public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<com.lifetracker.shared.application.dto.ApiResponse<com.lifetracker.modules.expenses.dto.ExpenseResponse>> com.lifetracker.modules.expenses.api.ExpenseController.createExpense(com.lifetracker.modules.expenses.dto.CreateExpenseRequest): JSON parse error: Unexpected character ('i' (code 105)): was expecting double-quote to start field name 2026-06-28 14:40:24.543 DEBUG [main] o.s.w.s.m.m.a.ExceptionHandlerExceptionResolver - Using @ExceptionHandler com.lifetracker.shared.application.exception.ApiExceptionHandler#handleUnreadableMessage(HttpMessageNotReadableException) 2026-06-28 14:40:24.544 DEBUG [main] o.s.w.s.m.m.a.HttpEntityMethodProcessor - Using 'application/json', given [*/*] and supported [application/json, application/*+json] 2026-06-28 14:40:24.546 DEBUG [main] o.s.w.s.m.m.a.HttpEntityMethodProcessor - Writing [{error=Malformed JSON request body.}] 2026-06-28 14:40:24.547 DEBUG [main] o.s.w.s.m.m.a.ExceptionHandlerExceptionResolver - Resolved [org.springframework.http.converter.HttpMessageNotReadableException: JSON parse error: Unexpected character ('i' (code 105)): was expecting double-quote to start field name]
